areas_reviewed: Trust boundaries / source of truth (auth, org, models, locations, territories, options, calendar, paywall, discovery, uploads, audit)
App routing order (read-only): admin before effectiveRole, paywall guards, guest/package/deeplinks
agency_update_model_full call sites: AgencyControllerView, modelsImportSupabase, mediaslideSyncService, netwalkSyncService, modelsSupabase, modelPhotosSupabase
Paywall documentation alignment: PAYWALL_SECURITY_SUMMARY, subscriptionSupabase, SubscriptionContext
Stichprobe migrations: FOR ALL / security hardening file names; profiles.is_admin in migrations (comments/fixes only)
Stichprobe src: forbidden .eq('email') — zero matches under src/
high_findings: Booking Brief and calendar notes remain UI-filtered JSONB; any party that can SELECT the row can read full JSON — matches documented trust model; future hardening needs explicit product/security review.
accepted_architectural_limits: Dual channel option thread + B2B booking card + calendar (by design)
Mediaslide/Netwalk sync writes subset of model fields via agency_update_model_full
Calendar conflict on option submit is warning-only fail-open
Legacy null agency_organization_id / client_organization_id handled with OR filters in agency option reads
Paywall resolves org via oldest membership inside can_access_platform (documented exception to implicit org resolution)
manual_review_required: Run live-db pg_policies verification queries from auto-review.mdc when Supabase token available
pg_get_functiondef spot-check after any future RPC migration touching guards
do_not_touch: Paywall core decision chain (can_access_platform and related migration definitions)
Admin routing order relative to effectiveRole
